news.headline: Form 144: RPID affiliate notifies sale of 10,000 Class A shares (option exercise)
news.summary: Small insider sale via option exercise; prior sales noted on Jun 10, Jun 22 and Jul 1.

news.headline: Rapid Micro Biosystems Announces Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
news.summary: Routine grant of 60,000 restricted stock units to a newly hired employee, signaling continued headcount growth.

news.headline: Rapid Micro Biosystems prices ~$32M underwritten offering (units incl. warrants), ~$9.8M gross upfront
news.summary: Priced 3.58M Class A shares plus pre-funded/Series A/B warrants at $1.955/unit with Bain Capital Life Sciences and Armistice Capital participating; full warrant exercise could add ~$21.7M more but would further dilute holders.

news.headline: Q1 2026: revenue $8.0M (+11% YoY) beats forecast, EPS -$0.31 misses; 6 Growth Direct systems placed
news.summary: Growth Direct system placements (6 vs 3 a year ago) driving >30% consumables growth, but the GAAP net loss missed consensus by roughly 23%, reviving profitability concerns.

news.headline: Rapid Micro Biosystems reports record Q4/FY2025 results and issues FY2026 guidance
news.summary: Q4 2025 revenue hit a record $11.3M (+37% YoY), FY2025 revenue $33.6M (+20% YoY) on 28 system placements; guided FY2026 revenue to $37-41M on 30-38 planned placements.

news.headline: Samsung Biologics places follow-on multi-system Growth Direct order
news.summary: Samsung Biologics expanded its existing Growth Direct deployment with a follow-on multi-system order; management said this order underpins the low end of FY2026 guidance.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings (est. early/mid August)
catalysts.detail: Historically reports Q2 in early-to-mid August (Aug 4 in 2023, Aug 12 in 2025). Watch new Growth Direct placements, consumables pull-through and cash runway after the May raise, and progress toward the 30-38 unit FY2026 placement guidance.

catalysts.label: Additional large multi-system Growth Direct orders
catalysts.detail: The low end of FY2026 revenue guidance ($37M) assumes only the March Samsung Biologics order; the high end ($41M) needs further large customer orders, which would be a positive catalyst.

catalysts.label: Potential exercise of Series A/B warrants from the May 2026 offering
catalysts.detail: If investors from the May offering fully exercise their attached warrants for cash, RPID could receive up to an additional ~$21.7M, improving the balance sheet without a new financing round.

pulse: Fresh position (Jul 14-15 buys ~$2.11 avg). Micro-cap automation play in pharma QC: Growth Direct systems seed recurring consumables/service revenue, with FY2025 revenue up 20% to $33.6M and FY2026 guided to $37-41M on 30-38 planned system placements, underpinned by a March 2026 Samsung Biologics follow-on order. Story hinges on placement cadence and narrowing cash burn; the May ~$9.8M raise (up to $32M with warrants) buys runway but keeps dilution in the picture, and Q1 2026's EPS miss kept profitability concerns alive.
